title: July 15th, 2022

how do i slowly work my roam space?

review a few old items a day, hopefully selected from a variety of perspectives including totally random items, items with lots of connections or characters, items with few of those, to do items, done items, journal items, images, audio, video



i shouldn't dig around in my ear to scratch an itch. i don't want that. my body doesn't want that. i respect my body. i love my body. i need to do a better job showing that. if i don't do a better job of showing my love it won't be real. i'm afraid that if i don't communicate my love better the person i love will leave me. i'm afraid that if i don't communicate better the people i'm communicating with will leave me. i'm afraid the people i'm with don't consider me one of theirs and i need to convince them. if i can't convince people that i'm like them, i'll be alone in the wild. i don't want to be alone in the wild. i'm not like them. even if i convince people that i'm like them, it takes compounding effort to conceal ways that i'm not like them. i'm afraid that discrepancies will undermine my claim and discount me and that i will be left behind by people who insist they aren't going anywhere. my ears not itchy anymore. i'm going for a walk. i still don't know how i feel about getting coffee or not getting it. neither seems well fit

i distracted myself from itching my ear earlier by typing my thoughts in roam and getting caught up in those thoughts. after that i had those thoughts available and primed when interacting with amber and brandi. i also kept roam open and returned to it to write some lyrics, to communicate some difficult feelings with brandi, and then to wander and putter my graph. at some point i might actually manage to investigate canceling my membership (what consequences mainly)
